seoTitle: Mulgildie vs Mulgrave — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mulgildie and Mulgrave. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulgildie and Mulgrave.
heading: Mulgildie vs Mulgrave — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulgildie, Queensland and Mulgrave, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulgrave has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mulgildie (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulgildie or Mulgrave safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulgildie has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Mulgrave scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulgildie scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mulgrave scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulgildie or Mulgrave?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulgrave has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
